'''鈭歬-n-m''' ('''kakanam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quarry|quarry]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-n-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quarry|quarry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-n-m
|-
! Lemma
| kakanam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikanam|thikanam]] || [[word:jikanam|jikanam]] || [[word:shikanam|shikanam]] || [[word:kikanam|kikanam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukanam|thuthukanam]] || [[word:jujukanam|jujukanam]] || [[word:shushukanam|shushukanam]] || [[word:kukukanam|kukukanam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukanam|thukanam]] || [[word:jukanam|jukanam]] || [[word:shukanam|shukanam]] || [[word:kukanam|kukanam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukanam|thukanam]] || [[word:jukanam|jukanam]] || [[word:shukanam|shukanam]] || [[word:kukanam|kukanam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekanam|thekanam]] || [[word:jekanam|jekanam]] || [[word:shekanam|shekanam]] || [[word:kekanam|kekanam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokanam|thothokanam]] || [[word:jojokanam|jojokanam]] || [[word:shoshokanam|shoshokanam]] || [[word:kokokanam|kokokanam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokanam|thokanam]] || [[word:jokanam|jokanam]] || [[word:shokanam|shokanam]] || [[word:kokanam|kokanam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokanam|thokanam]] || [[word:jokanam|jokanam]] || [[word:shokanam|shokanam]] || [[word:kokanam|kokanam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kanam|kanam]] || [[word:kanam|kanam]] || [[word:kanam|kanam]] || [[word:kanam|kanam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kanam|kanam]] || [[word:kanam|kanam]] || [[word:kanam|kanam]] || [[word:kanam|kanam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kanam|kanam]] || [[word:kanam|kanam]] || [[word:kanam|kanam]] || [[word:kanam|kanam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kanam|kanam]] || [[word:kanam|kanam]] || [[word:kanam|kanam]] || [[word:kanam|kanam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kanam|th忙kanam]] || [[word:j忙kanam|j忙kanam]] || [[word:sh忙kanam|sh忙kanam]] || [[word:k忙kanam|k忙kanam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakanam|thathakanam]] || [[word:jajakanam|jajakanam]] || [[word:shashakanam|shashakanam]] || [[word:kakakanam|kakakanam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakanam|thakanam]] || [[word:jakanam|jakanam]] || [[word:shakanam|shakanam]] || [[word:kakanam|kakanam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakanam|thakanam]] || [[word:jakanam|jakanam]] || [[word:shakanam|shakanam]] || [[word:kakanam|kakanam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakanam|shakanam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakanam|goshakanam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakanam|gokishakanam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakanamn眉|shakanamn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakanamnkn眉|goshakanamnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakanamn眉|gokishakanamn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakanamsh毛|shakanamsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakanamnksh毛|goshakanamnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakanamsh毛|gokishakanamsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakanamro|shakanamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakanamnkro|goshakanamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakanamro|gokishakanamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakanammu|shakanammu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakanamnkmu|goshakanamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakanammu|gokishakanammu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakanamsher|shakanamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakanamnksher|goshakanamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakanamsher|gokishakanamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakanamng|shakanamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakanamnkng|goshakanamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakanamng|gokishakanamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakanamya|shakanamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakanamnkya|goshakanamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakanamya|gokishakanamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakanamyam|shakanamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakanamnkyam|goshakanamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakanamyam|gokishakanamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakanamn眉sh毛|shakanamn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakanamnkn眉sh毛|goshakanamnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakanamn眉sh毛|gokishakanamn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakanamn眉ro|shakanamn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakanamnkn眉ro|goshakanamnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakanamn眉ro|gokishakanamn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakanamn眉mu|shakanamn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakanamnkn眉mu|goshakanamnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakanamn眉mu|gokishakanamn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakanamsh毛n眉|shakanamsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakanamnksh毛n眉|goshakanamnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakanamsh毛n眉|gokishakanamsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakanamsh毛ro|shakanamsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakanamnksh毛ro|goshakanamnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakanamsh毛ro|gokishakanamsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakanamsh毛mu|shakanamsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakanamnksh毛mu|goshakanamnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakanamsh毛mu|gokishakanamsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakanamron眉|shakanamron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakanamnkron眉|goshakanamnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakanamron眉|gokishakanamron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakanamrosh毛|shakanamrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakanamnkrosh毛|goshakanamnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakanamrosh毛|gokishakanamrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakanamromu|shakanamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakanamnkromu|goshakanamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakanamromu|gokishakanamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakanammun眉|shakanammun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakanamnkmun眉|goshakanamnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakanammun眉|gokishakanammun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakanammush毛|shakanammush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakanamnkmush毛|goshakanamnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakanammush毛|gokishakanammush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakanammuro|shakanammuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakanamnkmuro|goshakanamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakanammuro|gokishakanammuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
